reviews.author: Kimmie Snyder
reviews.text: Reuben was flexible with scheduling, fair with pricing, and he did beautiful work! I will definitely use him again and recommend him to friends!

reviews.author: Alex Lemon
reviews.text: Always had a great experience with Dream Steam. Professional and got my couch clean of toddler residue!

reviews.author: Gabriella Marvin
reviews.text: Ruben came to our new house on a Sunday afternoon to clean a few rugs. He was on time and communicative about his process. While we were unpacking a moving truck I was injured and Ruben jumped in to help us finish unload! Great guy, and great service. 10/10 would recommend!

reviews.author: Elan Rasabi
reviews.text: Great service! Professional and flexible. Wouldn't go anywhere else in the area.

reviews.author: Kristen Oliver
reviews.text: Very professional and friendly, at a fantastic price. Did a great job cleaning and sanitizing a couch I bought secondhand. I appreciated his honesty about what I could reasonably expect from the results. Overall, very happy with the finished product.

notes: Dream Steam Fabric Cleaners. Owner Reuben (also spelled Ruben in some reviews). Atlanta (2250 N Druid Hills Rd, Suite 265). 5.0 / 37 reviews. Fabric + upholstery + rug cleaning.

capture_attempts.reason: 5 verbatim reviews captured from HTML inline
